overview.zh: 辊式强磁湿式磁选机是一种高效的湿式磁选设备，专为处理细粒级弱磁性矿物设计。该设备采用磁辊结构，产生11000-13500高斯的强磁场，适用于赤铁矿、褐铁矿、镜铁矿、钒钛磁铁矿、钨锰矿、锆英砂等弱磁性和中等磁性矿物的选别。湿式工艺使其处理细粒物料的效果更佳，提高了回收率和精矿品位。设备结构紧凑，操作维护简单，适用于中小型选矿厂的各类弱磁性矿物的选别作业。
overview.en: The Roller-type High-intensity Wet Magnetic Separator is an efficient wet magnetic separation equipment specifically designed for fine-grained weakly magnetic minerals. The equipment adopts a magnetic roller structure, generating a strong magnetic field of 11000-13500 Gauss, suitable for the separation of weakly and medium magnetic minerals such as hematite, limonite, specularite, vanadium-titanium magnetite, wolframite, manganese ore, zircon sand, etc. The wet process makes it more effective in processing fine-grained materials, improving recovery rates and concentrate grade. With a compact structure and simple operation and maintenance, it is suitable for various weakly magnetic mineral separation operations in small and medium-sized mineral processing plants.

note.zh: 可按照客户需求进行定制
note.en: Can be customized according to customer requirements

zh: 磁辊结构设计，磁场强度高达11000-13500高斯
湿式工艺处理，适用于细粒弱磁性矿物的分选
多种规格型号可选，适应不同生产规模需求
分选精度高，回收率好，精矿品位高
结构紧凑，占地面积小，安装维护简便
能耗低，操作简单，运行稳定可靠
en: Magnetic roller design with high magnetic field strength up to 11000-13500 Gauss
Wet processing, suitable for fine-grained weakly magnetic mineral separation
Multiple specifications and models available to meet different production scale requirements
High separation precision, good recovery rate, high concentrate grade
Compact structure, small footprint, easy installation and maintenance
Low energy consumption, simple operation, stable and reliable running

description.zh: 用于赤铁矿、褐铁矿、镜铁矿等弱磁性铁矿的选别
description.en: Separation of weakly magnetic iron ores such as hematite, limonite, specularite, etc.

description.zh: 用于钨矿、锡矿、钼矿等有色金属矿的分选
description.en: Separation of non-ferrous metal ores such as tungsten, tin, molybdenum, etc.

description.zh: 用于钽铌矿、锆英砂等稀有金属矿的分选
description.en: Separation of rare metal ores such as tantalum-niobium ore, zircon sand, etc.

description.zh: 用于石英、长石等非金属矿物中铁质杂质的去除
description.en: Removal of iron impurities from non-metallic minerals such as quartz, feldspar, etc.
